holdings.infoBox: SDS is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings. The top holdings are ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF stock at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, and TREASURY BILL at N/A.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort S&P 500 (SDS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 500 large- and mid-cap US firms selected by the S&P Committee. SDS was launched on Jul 11, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Top 10 Most Traded Leveraged ETFs (DWT, UWT)
data.text: Leveraged ETFs use the futures markets to magnify the returns of a specific index. These ten leveraged ETFs are the most popular with investors.

data.title: Inverse Index ETFs Form Potential Double Bottom
data.text: Disappointing manufacturing data sparked trade war fallout fears Tuesday. Short the major indexes by going long these three inverse ETFs.
